description_long: This is a medium-sized, brown backpack with a classic, boxy shape and a structured form. The main body is a rich brown color, featuring a large front flap secured by a central dark brown strap with a metallic buckle. On top, a rolled yellow sleeping mat is attached horizontally, held in place by the main strap. The back of the backpack has two wide, angular shoulder straps, and the sides are slightly faceted for added structure. A small red and gold circular badge is affixed to the front flap, adding a touch of decoration. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for urban or outdoor use, with a focus on durability and functionality.
description: A structured brown backpack with a front buckle, yellow rolled mat on top, and a red and gold badge on the front flap.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main flap with a central buckle, a red and gold badge, and the yellow rolled mat on top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the rolled mat's spiral end and the thickness of the main body, with the side profile of the buckle visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the two wide, angular shoulder straps and the attachment points for the top mat.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the rolled mat's spiral and the side profile of the backpack.
attribute_brand_logo: A small circular badge with a gold center and red ribbon is located on the front flap, upper right side. No text or recognizable brand symbols are present.
attribute_strap_design: Two wide, angular shoulder straps made of the same brown material as the body, attached at the top and bottom rear. No visible padding or chest strap.
attribute_pocket_configuration: One main compartment accessed via the front flap; no visible external or side pockets.
attribute_decorative_elements: A small red and gold circular badge on the front flap; no other decorative elements visible.
